content.en:
"A true ancestor in the early stage of the Great Dao dares to be so rampant!"

A Dao Ancestor incarnate said coldly.

In his eyes, the true ancestor of the early stage of the general avenue was undoubtedly an ant, not to mention that the true ancestor in front of him was suppressed by heaven and earth and the origin was counterattacked, even if he was desperate, his combat power was definitely not half of the peak.

If he wanted such a true ancestor, he could easily kill it in an instant.

Immediately, he struck.

The other Dao Ancestor incarnations and a large number of True Monarchs did not make a move, quietly observing this battle.

Seeing a Dao Ancestor incarnation rushing towards him, the True Ancestor sneered: "Dao Ancestor incarnation, the aura is so weak, at first glance, it is a Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it is also the weakest Heavenly Dao Ancestor, I haven't seen such a weak Dao Ancestor for a long time!"

These words completely stimulated the Dao Ancestor, and the killing intent boiled immediately.

But suddenly, a shocking scene happened.

I saw that the True Ancestor's hands turned black, and he directly broke through the origin divine power of the Dao Ancestor incarnation, and came directly to the Dao Ancestor incarnation, easily tearing the Dao Ancestor incarnation apart, and it could never be recovered.

An incarnation of a Dao Ancestor was directly killed in seconds!

"It's too weak!"

The True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect said lightly.

"This ......"

Many True Monarchs were shocked, this True Ancestor was too powerful.

In particular, some True Monarchs have killed True Ancestors, but the True Ancestors they have killed in the past are not at all a grade compared to this True Ancestor, and the gap between the two sides is too big.

It seems that those True Ancestors are just defective products, this is the real True Ancestor!

"Die, none of the cultivators who entered the Sunset Sect today want to leave!"

The True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect roared.

Immediately, a True Ancestor named Sunset Sect tore through the space and surrounded the huge Sunset Sect, and the True Ancestor aura locked on countless True Monarchs.

"Thirty True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian noticed the number of these True Ancestors, and his face was a little solemn.

These True Ancestors are not weak True Ancestors, but real genius True Ancestors, and I am afraid that even those True Monarchs who are at the top of the True Monarch List are not the opponents of these True Ancestors after entering the True Ancestor realm.

Each of these True Ancestors has mastered multiple Origin Divine Powers, and they are not ordinary Origin Divine Powers, they are all top-grade Origin Divine Powers, and their foundations are very strong, and their combat effectiveness is too strong.

Even Ye Tian was not sure that he could defeat any True Ancestor, and at most he could barely save his life.

At this moment, Ye Tian truly realized the strength of the Domain Realm True Ancestor, which was far from being comparable to their Domain Realm True Ancestor.

Of course, if he was promoted to the True Ancestor realm, he could easily slaughter these Domain Realm True Ancestors, and he didn't even need to be promoted to the True Ancestor realm, he only needed to practice the eighth and ninth poles of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique to form the Extreme Dao Body, and he could easily suppress these True Ancestors.

"Kill!"

The true ancestors of the Sunset Sect had limited time and could not survive for too long, so they cast forbidden techniques one by one, and their strength skyrocketed again, and they immediately killed countless true monarchs.

They didn't like to kill Dao Ancestor incarnations very much, because they knew that these people were Dao Ancestor incarnations, and killing them was just destroying an incarnation, and they couldn't kill a Dao Ancestor at all.

In this case, it is better to kill the True Monarchs, so as to counteract the anger of the Sunset Sect.

"Ahhh......h

The screams came and went, and there was a miserable picture in the Sunset Sect.

A large number of True Monarchs were slaughtered, and even the True Monarchs of the four transcendent forces had fallen people.

For example, in the Starhorn Clan, one of Tuolong's half-step True Ancestor guards was pinched to death by a Sunset Sect True Ancestor in order to protect Tuolong's escape.

Originally, Tuolong was injured by Ye Tian and left here, but he didn't want to give up the treasures and resources of the Sunset Sect, and after using the healing pill to recover his injuries, he came in again.

But I never expected that I would encounter such a thing as soon as I entered the Sunset Sect, which was really unlucky!

Almost every second, more than 10,000 True Monarchs fell, and even one Dao Ancestor incarnation was killed.

----------

Outside the boundary.

A group of Dao Ancestors were extremely angry, their incarnations had fallen, and there was no way to descend to the Quasi-Dao Realm in a short period of time, the loss was too great.

The four transcendent forces are stationed, and the eyes of the Dao Ancestors are also focused on the battlefield ruins, although they can't see the situation of the battlefield ruins clearly, but one by one Dao Ancestor incarnations were killed, and the information was naturally brought out.

Then.

The four transcendent forces can't be calm, after all, the true monarchs and half-step true ancestors of the four transcendent forces are also among them, especially the Dao ancestors of the Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain, who are even more nervous.

There are relatively few true monarchs in Daoshan and the Forbidden Palace, because their requirements for accepting disciples are too high, and they are more distressed when they fall a disciple!

The Starhorn Beast clan was also more panicked, for fear that Tuolong would fall in the Sunset Sect.

"I'm going to incarnate and descend on the ruins of the Quasi-Dao Realm Battlefield!"

Luohai Great Ancestor said in a deep voice.

Rumble!!!!!

Luohai Great Ancestor stripped off some of the flesh and blood on his body, condensed it into an incarnation, and immediately tore through the Dao boundary barrier of the quasi-Dao realm, and directly descended on the battlefield ruins.

Battlefield relics.

Luohai Great Ancestor descended, and his powerful aura far surpassed that of other Dao Ancestor incarnations.

"It's Luohai Great Ancestor!"

Tuolong was in ecstasy.

Luohai Great Ancestor is a top-tier Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, his strength is far beyond that of ordinary Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, even if a clone comes, his strength is also very strong, and he can easily defeat the incarnation of a One-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

After the arrival of the Great Ancestor of Luohai, he did not directly face the true ancestor of the Sunset Sect, but looked for the trace of Tuolong.

Soon, he spotted Tuolong and flew quickly.

"Tuolong, let's go, get out of here!"

Luohai Great Ancestor said coldly.

"Yes!"

Tuolong nodded.

He also wanted to leave the Sunset Sect, but since the thirty true ancestors of the Sunset Sect surrounded the Sunset Sect and blocked the exit to go out, he didn't dare to force his way in, otherwise he would fall in an instant.

But with the blessing of Luohai Great Ancestor, he has hope of escaping.

Rumble!!!

Luohai Great Ancestor escorted Tuo Long and several other Star Horn Beast True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors, and rushed to the exit.

Soon, a Sunset Sect True Ancestor noticed the Luohai Great Ancestor.

"Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation, hmph, stay here!"

The True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect said coldly.

Then, this True Ancestor blasted over with a great sun in his hand,

Luohai Great Ancestor turned into an ocean to fight against him, but the sea water was all annihilated in an instant, and even his Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation was cracked.

"How can it be so powerful!"

Luo Hai Great Ancestor was shocked.

He had heard those Dao Ancestors say that the true ancestors of the Sunset Sect were very strong, but he just thought that those True Ancestors were making excuses for the fall of their incarnations, and deliberately boasted about these true ancestors of the Sunset Sect.

But now I know that those Dao Ancestors didn't brag at all.

The true ancestors of the Sunset Sect are really strong and strong, and the most demonic group of the Starhorn Beast Clan's early stage True Ancestors may have such strength, and they must be the True Ancestors who have stayed in the early stage of the Great Dao for a long time, and the True Ancestors who have just broken through are far inferior to these True Ancestors of the Sunset Sect at all.

Thundered!!!

Under the attack again and again, Luohai Great Ancestor was also a little unable to bear it, but he still tried his best to protect Tuolong, but he did not protect the other Star Horn Beast True Monarch.

After the Luohai Great Ancestor was hit hard, they finally broke out of the encirclement, left the Sunset Sect, and returned to the outside world.

"I escaped a few, I can't take care of it, kill the rest first!"

The True Ancestors of the Sunset Sect did not go after the Great Ancestor of Luohai, but continued to attack the other True Monarchs.
